title: Education
description: Universities, student visas, discounts and student life in Belgium.

items.title: Universities
items.description: Belgium hosts several highly-ranked universities, including KU Leuven, Ghent University, ULB and VUB (Brussels), and UCLouvain.
tips: Many master's programmes are taught in English
Application deadlines are often 6+ months before the academic year starts

meta.notable: KU Leuven, Ghent University, ULB, VUB, UCLouvain

items.title: Student Visa (Type D)
items.description: Indian students admitted to a Belgian institution need a long-stay Type D student visa, applied for through VFS Global after receiving an admission letter.
steps: Get an unconditional admission letter from a recognised Belgian institution
Gather proof of funds and accommodation
Apply for the Type D visa well before the semester start
Register with the local municipality on arrival
tips: Apply at least 2-3 months ahead of your intended start date

items.title: Student Discounts
items.description: Student cards (often the university ID) unlock discounts on transport, museums and more.
tips: SNCB offers reduced-fare Go Pass tickets for under-26s
Many museums offer free or discounted entry with a student card

items.title: Libraries
items.description: University and public libraries are generally open to residents and students, often with extended hours during exam periods.
